test_cases.input_summary: 20-minute radio documentary 'The Last Post Office'. Rural post office closing after 140 years. 4 clips (postmistress and community members), actuality sounds (door bell, date stamp, queue). Warm journalistic narrator.
test_cases.output_summary: Full structured script with NAR, CLIP, and ATMOS labels. Strong opening hook using actuality. Narration earns each clip without pre-quoting. Close is thematic and restrained. Correct clip-to-narration ratio.
test_cases.notes: Excellent fluency and emotional calibration. Relevance slightly marked: one narration block included a contextual detail about online banking not explicitly in the input — journalistically appropriate but not sourced from the input. Actionability: script used in edit with minor timing adjustments.

test_cases.input_summary: 30-minute investigative audio documentary about occupational safety failures in a warehouse distribution sector. 5 clips (injured workers, union rep, company spokesperson, safety regulator). Authoritative, measured narrator. Actuality: factory floor ambient, regulatory hearing room tone.
test_cases.output_summary: Script maintains investigative register throughout. Narration before company spokesperson clip sets up the challenge without pre-framing the audience's response. Regulatory language used accurately. Structure moves through incident → investigation → accountability → systemic question.
test_cases.notes: Professionalism and relevance high. Coherence slightly marked: one transition between the injured worker section and the union section felt slightly abrupt — a single bridging sentence would smooth it. Consistency: one figure cited in narration (injury rate) was not in the input; flagged and removed before broadcast.

test_cases.input_summary: 15-minute portrait documentary about a retiring search-and-rescue volunteer. Intimate, first-person narrator tone. 3 clips (subject, colleague, family member). Actuality: coastal wind, radio crackle.
test_cases.output_summary: Script uses actuality as emotional punctuation with confidence. Narration is intimate without being mawkish. Portrait structure used effectively: opens at subject's last call-out, moves to biography, ends with looking forward. Closes without sentiment but with warmth.
test_cases.notes: Strongest test. Actuality integration is confident and musical. Relevance marked slightly: one narration passage moved into broader search-and-rescue context that extended marginally beyond the individual portrait brief, though it added genuine editorial value.
